# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

export type User = {
  id: number;
  name: string;
  email: string;
};

export interface UserSearchOptions {
  id?: number | string; // either a single ID, or a range of IDs to filter results by (lower and upper limits)
  name?: string[]; // case-insensitive search term(s), or an array of them for multiple terms
  email?: string[]; // case insensitive search term(s)
}
export interface UserSearchResults {
  user: User;
  count: number;
  totalCount: number;
}
